GGROUND:CD4_T_CELL.label: CD4+ T cell
GGROUND:CD4_T_CELL.caveat: Curated alias for 'CD4-positive, alpha-beta T cell' (CL:0000624); this exact phrasing is not a literal CL synonym.

GGROUND:ACTIVATED_T_CELL.label: activated T cell
GGROUND:ACTIVATED_T_CELL.caveat: Mapped to 'activated CD4-positive, alpha-beta T cell' (CL:0000896) as the closest CD4-context match; CL has no unqualified 'activated T cell' class.

GGROUND:TYPE1_HELPER_T_CELL.label: type 1 helper T cell
GGROUND:TYPE1_HELPER_T_CELL.caveat: Alternate word order for 'T-helper 1 cell' (CL:0000545); not present verbatim among CL synonyms.

GGROUND:TYPE2_HELPER_T_CELL.label: type 2 helper T cell
GGROUND:TYPE2_HELPER_T_CELL.caveat: Alternate word order for 'T-helper 2 cell' (CL:0000546); not present verbatim among CL synonyms.

GGROUND:TH1_LIKE_STATE.label: Th1-like polarization state
GGROUND:TH1_LIKE_STATE.caveat: This is a transcriptional cell STATE inferred from Perturb-seq analysis, not a strict Cell Ontology class. Loosely related to 'T-helper 1 cell' (CL:0000545) but not equivalent — treat as a signature-level label, not a cell type.

GGROUND:TH2_LIKE_STATE.label: Th2-like polarization state
GGROUND:TH2_LIKE_STATE.caveat: This is a transcriptional cell STATE inferred from Perturb-seq analysis, not a strict Cell Ontology class. Loosely related to 'T-helper 2 cell' (CL:0000546) but not equivalent — treat as a signature-level label, not a cell type.
